zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Grey I於1285年出生在英國諾圖波藍德卡素 希頓時，他的父親Thomas de Grey19歲，母親Lady Alice de Neville16歲。他於大約1327年與Agnes de Beyle在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德海頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1304年登記服兵役。他去世於1344年3月12日在英國諾圖波藍德林加姆享年59歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Grey I于1285年出生在英国諾圖波藍德卡素 希頓时，他的父亲Thomas de Grey19岁，母亲Lady Alice de Neville16岁。他于大约1327年与Agnes de Beyle在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德海頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1304年登记服兵役。他去世于1344年3月12日在英国諾圖波藍德林加姆享年59岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Grey I was born in 1285, in Castle Heaton, Northumberland, England, his father, Thomas de Grey, was 19 and his mother, Lady Alice de Neville, was 16. He married Agnes de Beyle about 1327, in Hetton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1304. He died on 12 March 1344, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Chillingham, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Grey I est né en 1285, à Castle Heaton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Grey, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Neville, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Beyle environ 1327, à Hetton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1304. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1344, à Chillingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Chillingham, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Grey I 1285 in Castle Heaton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Grey 19 und seine Mutter Lady Alice de Neville 16. Er hat um 1327 in Hetton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Beyle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1304 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 12. März 1344 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Chillingham, Northumberland, England und wurde in Chillingham, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Grey I è nato il nel 1285 nel Castle Heaton, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Grey, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice de Neville, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Beyle circa 1327, nel Hetton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1304. Morì il 12 marzo 1344, nel Chillingham, Northumberland, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Chillingham, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Grey Iが1285年にイギリスノースウンバーランドカストル ヒートンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Greyは19歳，母Lady Alice de Nevilleは16歳であった。約1327年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドヘットオンでAgnes de Beyleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1304年に兵役登録をした。彼は1344年3月12日にイギリスノースウンバーランドチリンガムで59歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドチリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Grey I(이)가 1285년 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀 히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Grey(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice de Neville(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 헤턴에서 Agnes de Beyle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1344년 3월 12일 영국 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 치링함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Grey I nasceu em 1285, em Castle Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Grey, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Neville, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Beyle aproximadamente 1327, em Hetton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1304. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1344, em Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Grey I родился в 1285 г. в местности кастл хитон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Grey было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Neville, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Beyle около 1327 г. в местности хеттон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1304 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 12 марта 1344 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Grey I nació en 1285, en Castle Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Grey, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Alice de Neville, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Agnes de Beyle aproximadamente 1327, en Hetton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1304. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1344, en Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
